Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.youtube

Interface YouTubeChatEventListener

public interface YouTubeChatEventListener
Listener for YouTube chat events.
Since:
1.0.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    onBroadcastEnd(YouTubeChat chat)
    Called when the broadcast ends.
    default void
    onChat(ChatItem item)
    Called for a regular chat message.
    default void
    onConnect(YouTubeChat chat, boolean isReconnecting)
    Called when the chat client connects.
    default void
    onConnectionClosed(int code, String reason, boolean remote, boolean tryingToReconnect)
    Called when the chat connection is closed.
    default void
    onError(Exception ex)
    Called when an error occurs.
    default void
    onNewMember(ChatItem item)
    Called when a new member message is received.
    default void
    onSuperChat(ChatItem item)
    Called for a Super Chat message.
    default void
    onSuperSticker(ChatItem item)
    Called for a Super Sticker event.

  • Method Details

    • onConnect

      default void onConnect(YouTubeChat chat, boolean isReconnecting)
      Called when the chat client connects.
      Parameters:
      chat - the connected chat client
      isReconnecting - true when this connection is from a reconnect attempt

    • onConnectionClosed

      default void onConnectionClosed(int code, String reason, boolean remote, boolean tryingToReconnect)
      Called when the chat connection is closed.
      Parameters:
      code - the close status code
      reason - the close reason
      remote - true if the remote endpoint initiated closure
      tryingToReconnect - true if a reconnect attempt will follow

    • onBroadcastEnd

      default void onBroadcastEnd(YouTubeChat chat)
      Called when the broadcast ends.
      Parameters:
      chat - the chat client whose broadcast ended

    • onError

      default void onError(Exception ex)
      Called when an error occurs.
      Parameters:
      ex - the raised exception

    • onChat

      default void onChat(ChatItem item)
      Called for a regular chat message.
      Parameters:
      item - the received chat item

    • onSuperChat

      default void onSuperChat(ChatItem item)
      Called for a Super Chat message.
      Parameters:
      item - the received paid message item

    • onSuperSticker

      default void onSuperSticker(ChatItem item)
      Called for a Super Sticker event.
      Parameters:
      item - the received paid sticker item

    • onNewMember

      default void onNewMember(ChatItem item)
      Called when a new member message is received.
      Parameters:
      item - the membership chat item
